item.arguments: Use $fw-debug on issue #182. It describes a production bug in the retry flow.
special_constraints: Start from the issue report when possible.
success_definition: Moves into evidence and root-cause work.
Does not jump straight to code edits.

item.arguments: Use $fw-debug on this stack trace: nil pointer in webhook retry handler after timeout.
special_constraints: Require a failing test or reproducer before the fix.
success_definition: Calls for a red failing signal.

item.arguments: Use $fw-debug on this bug where the code follows the current design, but the design now conflicts with real user needs.
special_constraints: Route upstream when the design is the problem.
success_definition: Recognizes this can become a design or requirements issue.
Routes to brainstorming or planning rather than papering over it.
Still preserves the reproducer as the truth surface.
